duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhin-nushur
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who gave us life after causing us to die, and to Him is the resurrection.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا، وَبِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا، وَبِكَ نَحْيَا، وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ النُّشُورُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma bika asbahna, wa bika amsayna, wa bika nahya, wa bika namutu wa ilayhin-nushur
duas.translation: O Allah, by You we enter the morning and by You we enter the evening, by You we live and by You we die, and to You is the Final Return.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا، وَبِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا، وَبِكَ نَحْيَا، وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma bika amsayna, wa bika asbahna, wa bika nahya, wa bika namutu wa ilayhil-masir
duas.translation: O Allah, by You we enter the evening and by You we enter the morning, by You we live and by You we die, and to You is the Final Return.

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُونَ
duas.transliteration: Subhanal-ladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinina wa inna ila Rabbina lamunqalibun
duas.translation: Glory is to Him Who has provided this for us though we could never have had it by our efforts. Surely, unto our Lord we are returning.

duas.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ (ثَلاثَاً) اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلامُ، وَمِنْكَ السَّلامُ، تَبَارَكْتَ يَا ذَا الْجَلالِ وَالإِكْرَامِ
duas.transliteration: Astaghfirullah (three times). Allahumma Antas-Salamu wa minkas-salamu, tabarakta ya Dhal-Jalali wal-Ikram
duas.translation: I ask Allah for forgiveness (three times). O Allah, You are As-Salam and from You is all peace, blessed are You, O Possessor of majesty and honour.
